feed.title: SolfeGuido
feed.subtitle: MemE is a powerful and highly customizable GoHugo theme for personal blogs.

entry.title: Update 1.4
entry.summary: 1.4 : The Swedish Release A new version has been released ! This version fixes some rendering issues, improves some performances, and add new features, such as : The Swedish language A pop-up to notify when a new version is installed, what are the new features A step-by-step guide when first starting the game to configure it to fit the needs of the user You can get this release on github.
entry.content:
1.4 : The Swedish Release

A new version has been released !

This version fixes some rendering issues, improves some performances, and add new features, such as :

  • The Swedish language
  • A pop-up to notify when a new version is installed, what are the new features
  • A step-by-step guide when first starting the game to configure it to fit the needs of the user

You can get this release on github.

entry.title: Update 1.3
entry.summary: 1.3 : The Performance version A new version has been released ! This released is aimed toward performance improvements, some small things have been added as well, but not much. Saving the statistcs right after a game is finished to avoid loosing data The notes fade in and fade-out When giving a wrong answer, the note become a “ghost note” Some very special effects at the end of a game Added ut3 and ut4 keys Improved performance for buttons Improved rendering performance of various objects The loading at the start is now longer to load all the notes Jingles have been added (but are not really cool for now) Enjoy !
entry.content:
1.3 : The Performance version

A new version has been released !

This released is aimed toward performance improvements, some small things have been added as well, but not much.

  • Saving the statistcs right after a game is finished to avoid loosing data
  • The notes fade in and fade-out
  • When giving a wrong answer, the note become a “ghost note”
  • Some very special effects at the end of a game
  • Added ut3 and ut4 keys
  • Improved performance for buttons
  • Improved rendering performance of various objects
  • The loading at the start is now longer to load all the notes
  • Jingles have been added (but are not really cool for now)

Enjoy !

entry.title: Released
entry.summary: Released ! SolfeGuido is now available on the play store at the following adress : https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=io.github.solfeguido
entry.content:
Released !

SolfeGuido is now available on the play store at the following adress : https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=io.github.solfeguido

entry.title: SolfeGuido
entry.summary: SolfeGuido Learn to read a music sheet the fun way ! SolfeGuido was created as a mobile game. It works on computer, but is more enjoyable on a phone or tablet. Features Train to read on three keys : G key F key F & G keys Many stats are available (and more to come) :
entry.content:
SolfeGuido

Learn to read a music sheet the fun way !

SolfeGuido was created as a mobile game. It works on computer, but is more enjoyable on a phone or tablet.

Features

  • Train to read on three keys :

    • G key
    • F key
    • F & G keys

  • Many stats are available (and more to come) :

    • Number of games played
    • Number of points won
    • Average reaction time
    • Wrong notes guessed
    • Longest play streak
    • Total time played

Example

Source code

SolfeGuido is open-source, the code is available at https://github.com/SolfeGuido/SolfeGuido
